title: DIRECT SUPPORT PROFESSIONAL PROGRAM - 211info
text: THE ARC JACKSON COUNTY DIRECT SUPPORT PROFESSIONAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance, information, and resources on community social services online or over the phone. 311 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 283-7529 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 283-7529 DSP Team Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - KEN WONDERLY MEMORIAL FUND If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE ARC JACKSON COUNTY
